title: cyclosorus crassifolius
intro: Cyclosorus crassifolius, also known as the Rough-leaved Cyclosorus or Rough-leaved Lip fern, is a type of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, primarily used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Cyclosorus crassifolius include its potential in reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and serving as an anti-inflammatory agent, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or dried and powdered for use in various medicinal applications.
